entity.label: Ittai

entity.description: A Benjamite, one of David’s thirty heroes (2 Sam. 23:29).

nodes.label: Ittai
nodes.description: A Benjamite, one of David’s thirty heroes (2 Sam. 23:29).

verses.text: Heleb the son of Baanah, a Netophathite, Ittai the son of Ribai out of Gibeah of the children of Benjamin,
Ithai the son of Ribai of Gibeah, that pertained to the children of Benjamin, Benaiah the Pirathonite,
